title: 维尼终于和泽连斯基通电话了
meta_description: 维尼终于和泽连斯基通电话了 - I had a long and meaningful phone call with 🇨🇳 President Xi Jinping. I believe that this call, as well as the appointment of Ukr...
meta_keywords: 维尼,终于,泽连,斯基,通电话
contents:
I had a long and meaningful phone call with 🇨🇳 President Xi Jinping. I believe that this call, as well as the appointment of Ukraine's ambassador to China, will give a powerful impetus to the development of our bilateral relations.

我与习近平主席进行了一次有意义的长通电话。我相信，此次通话以及乌方任命驻华大使，将为两国关系发展注入强大动力。

包子感觉是准备充当伟大和事佬了
